headline: Can Caterpillar Sustain Margins Amid Rising Tariff Pressures?
summary: CAT faces rising tariff-driven costs and margin pressure. Tariff impact is estimated at $2.2-$2.4 billion in 2026.

headline: Guess Which Stock Drove The Dow To 50,000? (It's Not Nvidia)
summary: The "Dow 50,000" party hats are out to celebrate the blue-chip index' milestone. But the move is coming from an unexpected source.

headline: Former Ford CEO Mark Fields calls company’s AI-energy pivot a 'smart move'
summary: Former Ford CEO Mark Fields joins ‘Squawk on the Street’ to discuss Ford as the auto giant is one of the biggest S&P gainers for this week, the company's AI data center pivot, and more.
